deblur.positive: Gently sharpen this exact photo. This is a light restoration, not a redraw: keep all people, their exact clothing, all objects and the background unchanged and aligned with the input. Photorealistic.
deblur.negative: repainted, regenerated, redrawn, changed clothing, changed people, extra limbs, deformed hands, added objects, removed objects, distortion, artifacts

relight_day.positive: Relight this scene to natural bright daytime with a realistic sky. Keep every object, person, vehicle and sign exactly the same in count, position and appearance - do not add or remove cars, do not change clothing or signs. Only the lighting changes. Photorealistic, not oversaturated.
relight_day.negative: oversaturated, overly colorful, changed clothing, changed signs, added cars, removed cars, added people, removed people, changed scene, distortion, artifacts

object_insert_fire.positive: Add one realistic fire that has broken out on a solid surface in the scene (the ground or an object), with natural flames, smoke and embers placed to match the room's geometry. Never place fire on water. Keep all people, objects and the background unchanged. Real photo look, photorealistic.
object_insert_fire.negative: cartoon fire, unrealistic fire, fire on water, floating fire, wrong perspective, campfire, full-frame fire, changed people, distortion, artifacts

normalize.positive: Apply only a subtle photographic clean-up: neutral white balance, balanced exposure and natural, accurate colors. Keep the content completely unchanged - same objects, people, background, composition and type of lighting. Photorealistic.
normalize.negative: color cast, overexposed, underexposed, stylized filter, relit, day-for-night, changed content, added objects, removed objects, changed people, repainted scene, distortion, artifacts

change_clothing.positive: Dress the people already in this photo in a full colorful clown costume (polka-dot suit, ruffled collar, big shoes). Keep their real faces and identities clearly recognizable with NO face paint and NO makeup. Keep the same people, the same poses and the same background. Photorealistic.
change_clothing.negative: clown makeup, face paint, changed face, different person, unrecognizable, added people, removed people, changed background, regenerated scene, distortion, artifacts
